source: 99acres Property Rate Trends (99acres.com, Mar 2026), MagicBricks Property Rates & Rental Index (magicbricks.com, Q3 2024 + 10% YoY adj), Housing.com Price Trends, NoBroker Rent Data, Coldwell Banker South India 2026 Guide, Times Now Bengaluru Rental Report
license: Curated from publicly available real estate portal data
rent_source: MagicBricks Rental Index Q3 2024 (most recent published data) adjusted ~10% upward for Mar 2026 based on 25% YoY rental surge trend. Areas without MagicBricks data estimated from comparable neighborhoods.
affordability_methodology: EMI at 8.00% p.a. (SBI/ICICI/HDFC typical rate for salaried professionals, Mar 2026), 20-year tenure, 80% LTV. Benchmarked against median Bangalore tech professional take-home of Rs 1,15,000/month (20 LPA CTC). EMI per lakh at 8.00%/20yr = Rs 836/month. Score = 100 - (EMI/income %). Higher = more affordable.

bank_rates_reference.rate_used: 8.00% (typical for salaried tech professional with 750+ CIBIL)
